top_signals.title: ECB May Act As Iran Shock Persists
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank may have to respond to the economic challenges arising from the conflict in the Middle East, according to Governing Council members Joachim Nagel and Francois Villeroy de Galhau, who spoke jointly to BTV’s Oliver Crook on the sidelines of the G7 Finance Ministers meeting in Paris on Tuesday.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reeves to use Parliament to drive through power plants and infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Major energy projects to be fast-tracked by curbing legal challenges and boosting Parliament's approval powers

top_signals.title: New Married At First Sight series still in edit despite ‘troubling’ allegations
top_signals.summary: Channel 4’s new chief executive, Priya Dogra, has said allegations surrounding Married at First Sight (MAFS) UK were “really hard to watch”, as the broadcaster weighs the future of the hit reality show while the next series remains in edit. Dogra confirmed on Wednesday that no decision had yet been made on whether the upcoming [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
